title: Pay to Contract (P2C)
description: Pay to Contract commits to offchain contract data by tweaking a public key with a hash-derived value, producing a payment destination that proves the commitment without placing the contract data onchain.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Applications
resources.notes: Explains how key tweaking publicly commits to an external contract without revealing it onchain.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Authorization and Authentication
resources.notes: Provides the public-key and signature context for key-based commitments.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Long-form treatment of Bitcoin keys, commitments, and application constructions.
